info.name: Promoo Backend — Full API (v1)
info.description:
Complete, hand-verified collection of every endpoint in the Promoo backend (108 requests).

Setup:
1. Set {{baseUrl}} (default http://localhost:3000/api/v1).
2. Run 'Auth > Login (Email)' — the access_token is auto-saved into {{token}}.
3. For admin endpoints, log in with an admin account and copy its token into {{adminToken}}.

Pre-filled real IDs (from the live DB): categoryId, planId, seatId, profileId. Other IDs (offerId, adId, roomId, etc.) are placeholders — fill them after creating resources.

Response shape: { success, data, message, meta? } on success; { success:false, data:null, message, error:{code,details?} } on error.

request.description: Requires Bearer token obtained from the reset-password email link.

item.name: Get Profile by ID or Username

request.description: multipart/form-data. bucket enum: avatars, covers, offers, ads, chat-media, services, stories, verifications, reports, general.

item.name: Admin
item.description: All admin endpoints require an admin account. Set {{adminToken}} to an admin user's access_token.

request.description: Called by Stripe only. Needs a valid Stripe-Signature; manual calls will fail signature verification. Listed for completeness.
